Indian Institute of Technology Bombay is a first-of-its-kind university that provides computer science training and education to undergraduates. A research institute, it has three campuses in India, including Mumbai, Mumbai, Chennai and Jadavpur.

The university also offers a range of courses, including computer science course, online courses, and courses in software security, data science courses, and data science course.
